app.title: Indonesia Flood Map
app.subtitle:
Explore flood events across Indonesia.
Contact: hi@faizkrisnadi.com
hero.title: Explore 26 years of flood events across Indonesia.
hero.body: The explorer treats Indonesia's administrative geography as the canonical spatial frame, then links Groundsource flood events through spatial intersection.
metric.help.unique_event_count: Number of flood events intersecting this area.
metric.help.flood_days: Number of days with at least one recorded flood event.
metric.help.sum_intersection_area_km2: Total flood-intersection area within this geography.
metric.help.max_coverage_ratio: Largest share of the area covered by one flood event.
panel.coverage_blocked: Nationwide public release is still blocked
panel.coverage_reason: The public dashboard is currently available down to district level.
panel.none_selected: Tap any region on the map to inspect its flood history.
evidence.none_selected: Select a region to compare the chosen metric with field reporting. The highlighted month never changes the active map time filter.
evidence.window_note: Highlighted month: {month}. This is the strongest contrast month within your selected range and does not change the active map filter.
evidence.gap.note.none: The internal metric and field reporting move in broadly the same direction for this period.
evidence.gap.note.internal_only: The internal metric signal is stronger than field reporting for this period.
evidence.gap.note.external_only: Field reporting is stronger than the internal metric signal for this period.
evidence.gap.note.mixed.internal_higher: Signals are mixed in this period, with the internal metric slightly stronger in the highlighted month.
evidence.gap.note.mixed.external_higher: Signals are mixed in this period, with field reporting slightly stronger in the highlighted month.
evidence.gap.context: Absolute signal gap: {gap}. Baseline gap: {baseline}. Geography level: {level_label}.
panel.qualitative_intro: A quick read of local reporting and field notes for the selected period.
status.no_groundsource: The Groundsource parquet has not yet been turned into public assets. The map still works for geography and coverage exploration.
status.groundsource_ready: Groundsource assets are ready for the public explorer.
status.coverage_warning: The public dashboard currently shows detail down to district level.
status.imagery_fallback: Free imagery is unavailable right now. Switched back to the main map view.
status.imagery_best_effort: Imagery and hybrid modes use free best‑effort sources.
warning.missing_required_levels: Province, regency, and district boundary layers are all required.
warning.district_threshold_not_met: District coverage is still below the public release threshold.
map.empty: No data for this time window.
method.summary: This dashboard combines Groundsource flood footprints with Indonesia's administrative boundaries so flood patterns can be explored by place and time.
method.note.geometry_proxy: Groundsource geometry is treated as a proxy for reported affected location, not a precise inundation boundary.
method.note.qualitative_sample: The Field Reports section is still an early curated sample of local reporting and does not yet cover all flood events nationally.
method.note.assignment: Groundsource does not include Indonesia admin names or codes, so location results are computed from polygon overlap with Indonesian administrative boundaries.
method.note.matching: One event can intersect multiple provinces, regencies, or districts, so the numbers shown here are overlap-based aggregates rather than a single exact admin label per event.
method.note.release_gate: This public dashboard is available at province, regency/city, and district levels.
method.note.prebuilt_assets: Map values, charts, and summaries update with the metric and time range you choose.
method.note.disclaimer: This dashboard is for public information only, not early warning or operational use.
qualitative.state_note.not_reviewed_yet: This period has not yet been reviewed for public field reporting.
qualitative.state_note.reviewed_but_no_p: This period has been reviewed, but there is no publishable field report yet.
qualitative.state_note.has_featured_repo: There is currently one curated lead report for this period.
There is one curated lead report plus supporting reports for this period.
qualitative.empty: No field report can be shown for this region and period yet.
qualitative.empty.not_reviewed_yet: Field reporting for this period has not been reviewed yet. The map, metrics, and quantitative summary remain available.
qualitative.empty.reviewed_but_no_publis: This period has been reviewed, but there is no publishable field report yet. The map, metrics, and quantitative summary remain available.
qualitative.empty.none_available: No field report is available for this region and period yet. Try another time range or region while continuing to use the map and quantitative metrics.
